Otrajā nodaļā tiek analizētas problēmas, ar kurām izstrādātāji var saskarties, strādājot ar JSON dažādos veidos Python vidē. Savukārt trešajā nodaļā tiek veikta salīdzinošā analīze starp dažādiem risinājumiem, kas var palīdzēt efektīvāk apstrādāt JSON formāta datus."

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? Yes, it gives brief description: first chapter overview of JSON format, its popularity, usage, strengths and weaknesses; second chapter problems developers face; third chapter comparative analysis of solutions. So compliance: true.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Yes, because it lists chapters and their content. So compliance: true.

But we must consider if there are any issues: maybe the text doesn't explicitly label chapters as "1.1", "1.2". But still, it lists them. So compliance true.

Thus produce array with 3 objects.
